item.title: Undelete [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Undelete [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: undeletefiles
item.itunes:summary:
Undelete
(Utilities)
Graphical user interface (GUI) based Image Undelete application easily restores completely distorted or vanished vital documents, office reports, birthday images, music etc in few mouse click. File Undelete software revives information that are lost from crashed multi storage FAT partition hard disk drive of system. Picture recovery application is proficient enough to restore entire information that got deleted permanently from your recycle bin.

[read more]

Picture recovery application is proficient enough to restore entire information that got deleted permanently from your recycle bin.

Picture recovery application is proficient enough to restore entire information that got deleted permanently from your recycle bin.

item.title: Memory Card Data Restore Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Memory Card Data Restore Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: pendrivedata
item.itunes:summary:
Memory Card Data Restore Software
(Utilities)
Worried about your lost data and eager to retrieve them safely without any change in quality and format? Just download Memory Card Data Restore Software on Windows PC that allows you to regain deleted or inaccessible files and folders and retrieve them in safe mode. Removable disk repair program easily generates preview of lost documents and enables users to choose which file to be stored on local hard disk of PC.

[read more]

Removable disk repair program easily generates preview of lost documents and enables users to choose which file to be stored on local hard disk of PC.

item.title: streamCapture2 [TV & Streaming]
item.itunes:title: streamCapture2 [TV & Streaming]
item.itunes:author: posktomten
item.itunes:summary:
streamCapture2
(TV & Streaming)
A program to save streaming video to your computer. A graphical shell for the command line program svtplay-dl
The program works with Linux, Windows and MacOS X. The program is written in C++ and uses Qt6 (Qt5 for older linux versions) graphic library.

streamCapture2 is available in three languages: English, Italian and Swedish

The AppImage updates itself, you only need to download once.

https://gitlab.com/posktomten/streamcapture2/-/wikis/home (Website)

https://ceicer.eu/streamcapture2 (Svensk hemsida)

https://youtu.be/I5hJKj7TYxM?si=B-soWX--4jt1qBH- (Video)

Manual English
https://bin.ceicer.com/streamcapture2/help-current/index_en_US.html
Manual Italian
https://bin.ceicer.com/streamcapture2/help-current/index_it_IT.html
Manual Svensk
https://bin.ceicer.com/streamcapture2/help-current/index_sv_SE.html

Video (Swedish)
https://youtu.be/1O9CW81LOIE
[read more]

item.title: Mac Recover Mobile [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Mac Recover Mobile [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: datarecoverydigcam
item.itunes:summary:
Mac Recover Mobile
(Utilities)
Extraordinary Mac Mobile phone recovery application regain erased pictures, deleted mp3 songs, lost files, movies, birthday photos, cute baby scraps etc. Extraordinary lost data restore Mac mobile software support advance GUI which helps user to easily understand application in few steps. Technically powerful Mac mobile erased restore software provides recovery of permanent corrupted files that are damaged due to different reasons such as system battery failure, crashed phone book memory, worms attack, human mistake, phone blocked etc. Safe and fast lost Mac mobile restore application helps user to retrieve file of different name and size at few clicks on mouse from cell phone. Simple to install Mac mobile phone data restore software easily provide backup of damaged wallpaper, memorable images etc in minimum time. Extra ordinary Mac mobile phone data restore application allows both technical and non-technical user to use such software without any problem. Easy to install and reasonable Mac recover mobile support latest GUI which helps user to understand software step by step in smooth way. Popular Mac cell phone recover software provides advance scanning technology to find out all erased, corrupted, misplaced files from memory card in original quality. Features- * Resourceful Mac mobile phone data recovery software easily restores all damaged images files, songs folders in original form with high resolution without affecting other save data. * Popular Mac mobile restore application helps user to take recovery of files of different format like riff, Jpeg, tiff, doc, Jpg and many others in minimum time. * Cost-effective lost file restore Mac mobile software helps user to take a view of lost data before actual recovery of damaged memory card. * Reasonable Mac mobile phone software supports much system that is based on MAC OS X like personal computer/laptop/desktop/palmtop/notebook etc.

[read more]

(Utilities)

[read more]

item.title: ToolsBaer MSG to HTML Conversion [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: ToolsBaer MSG to HTML Conversion [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: michaelgeorge
item.itunes:summary:
ToolsBaer MSG to HTML Conversion
(Utilities)
Users can convert MSG files to HTML format in bulk with the ToolsBaer MSG to HTML Conversion Software. Converting multiple MSG files and attachments to the HTML file format is possible with this method. Complete MS Outlook mailboxes can be converted to HTML file formats with only a few clicks using the MSG to HTML Conversion software. The program is available to every user with minimal technical knowledge. The software converts all attachments from Outlook MSG emails to HTML file format. Users can convert any large-size MSG file format to HTML without worrying about file size limitations. The software maintains that all email features—including to, cc, bcc, from, sent, date, and time—are fully converted into MSG emails. The program is easy to install on Windows 11, Windows 10, Windows 8.1, Windows 7, Windows XP, and Windows Vista. All versions of the Windows operating system are compatible with the MSG to HTML Conversion. Users can install this application on any Operating Systems application.
Read More:- http://www.toolsbaer.com/msg-to-html-conversion/
[read more]

item.title: Hard Drive Repair Mac [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Hard Drive Repair Mac [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: datarecoverydigcam
item.itunes:summary:
Hard Drive Repair Mac
(Utilities)
Download hard drive repair Mac software from data-recovery-digital-camera.com and regenerate all your accidentally lost or deleted digital office documents and multimedia data from external memory card storage in few simple mouse clicks. Proficient Mac memory card data retrieval application allows person to reform data from digital camera / cell phone memory card storage in minimal duration of time span that have been lost due to improper usage of media like removal of memory card while being accessed by some process of the device. Advanced hard drive repair Mac program recovers inaccessible data from corrupted memory card storage media that shows common logical errors while accessing data of external data storage media cards. Versatile Mac memory card data restoration software at data-recovery-digital-camera.com provides simple graphical interface having complete support manual throughout scanning and restoration process so even novice person can easily retrieve lost files from memory card media without requiring any special assistance. Professional hard drive repair Mac application reforms digital data files accidentally erased or lost from all type of micro/mini SD cards, xD picture cards, HDSC cards, MMC cards and other similar storage media devices. Creative digital memory card data restore program retrieves digital photograph memories, audio recordings, business office files, video clippings and other files lost due to software / hardware failure having compatibility with all major Apple Macintosh operating system versions. Features * Memory card data recovery software rescues digital files lost due to logical corruption in media cards. * Data recovery application for Mac recreates accidentally erased and virus infected files and folders. * Hard drive repair Mac software supports memory storage cards of all major brand manufacturers. * Mac memory card restoration program easily revives data from memory cards of any storage capacity.

[read more]
item.description:
Hard Drive Repair Mac
(Utilities)

item.title: Undelete Memory Card Files [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Undelete Memory Card Files [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: undeletefiles
item.itunes:summary:
Undelete Memory Card Files
(Utilities)
SFM mem-cards music undelete software recovers JEIDA and PCMCIA electronic media storage device files like zip, sit, tar, rar, txt, htm, html, xls, ppt, docx etc. This recovery solution used for retrieval of leading brands of storage cards such as inolta, Aiptek, Vivitar, Acer, Konica, Panasonic, Kodak, Lumicron, Lexar, Praktica, Nikon, Samsung, SanDisk, Casio, mustek, Relisys, Digital Dream, Sanyo, Yakumo, Umax and HP. Retrieve movie files, folders, clips, important data, stored in SD, XD card, Nexflash, MU-Flash, MMC or Flash memory stick. It has simple and hygienic features that help to understand the process of restoration. Retrieval procedure of important papers and credentials soft copy, decryption of encrypted valuable data is straightforward by this application. This mini storage digital media data recovery program has user friendly graphic interface for providing fast retrieving solution to retrieve your crashed hard disk and virus attacked pen drive. Utility rescue your logically encrypted and fragmented files and folders. Memory card 3gp data unerase tool recapture your lost song and iPod files. It supports Microsoft operating system versions including 11 , 10, and Windows 8. Software supports to repair audio and video files like mov, avi, mov, avs, mpg, mpeg, 3gp, ram, qt etc. Features: * This utility support PCMCIA and JEIDA technology. * Program permit to access infected SFM and SM cards data. * Tool can retrieve USB digital media images from miniature card. * Program can execute with all memory sticks and USB cards. * It works on every handy disk, USB pen drive and portable data storage card. * Application extracts missing files and corrupted folders. * It provides fearless solution and serenity from change of integrity, logical code alteration and data encryption.

[read more]

item.title: Digital Photo Recovery [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Digital Photo Recovery [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: datarecoverydigcam
item.itunes:summary:
Digital Photo Recovery
(Utilities)
Freeware retrieval application easily retrieves accidentally deleted data lost due to power faults, hardware/software malfunctioning, unexpected system shutdown, improper device handling, human errors, system crash, virus attacks or other similar data loss reasons. Data rescue utility facilitates users to restore deleted data files from various storage devices such as hard disk, mobile phones, digital camera, pen drive, memory stick, multimedia card, thumb drive of all major manufacturer storage brands including Sony, Samsung, Panasonic, HP, Philips, SanDisk, Kingston, Transcend, Olympus, Western digital, Nikon, Canon, Toshiba, Hitachi, Maxtor, Lexar etc and many more similar brands. Data retrieval tool supports to retrieve all damaged files in suitable graphic formats such as jpg, mpeg, bmp, tiff, gif, 3gp, html, zip, exe, doc, mov, txt, avi etc. Data restoration tool is suitable for all small and large scale organizations to restore corrupted files and folders from inaccessible storage devices in efficient manner. Data recovery software provides both install/uninstall support and effectively works on all major versions of Windows operating system including Windows 11,Win 10,Win 8 and 7 other. Data salvage program provides highly interactive user friendly GUI interface which helps user to easily understand the features and functionality of software without acquiring any special skills. Features: * Advance data retrieval program restores data even from emptied recycle bin folders or deleted using shift+Del key. * Best data rescue utility facilitates user to restore data files from previously existing partitions. * Data recovery tool salvages all deleted directories and sub directories with full accuracy and data integrity. * Affordable data recovery software is fast and reliable solution to restore damaged files in few mouse clicks.

[read more]
item.description:
Digital Photo Recovery
(Utilities)
Freeware retrieval application easily retrieves accidentally deleted data lost due to power faults, hardware/software malfunctioning, unexpected system shutdown, improper device handling, human errors, system crash, virus attacks or other similar data loss reasons. [read more]

item.title: Android File Restore [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Android File Restore [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: pendrivedata
item.itunes:summary:
Android File Restore
(Utilities)
Android File Restore application is widely used to recover all kind of permanently deleted or undeleted data files and folder from major critical data loss incidents. Affordable Data restoration program provide best methodology to revive various type file such as music, video, images, text files from different android technology based device. Company URL www.data-recovery-usb-drive.com is fully capable to retrieve user important document in format of PDF, DOC, HTML, TXT, EXCEL, POWER POINT etc in case of accidental damaged, power failure, software/hardware malfunction, improper handling of device etc.

[read more]
item.description:
Android File Restore
(Utilities)
Android File Restore application is widely used to recover all kind of permanently deleted or undeleted data files and folder from major critical data loss incidents. Affordable Data restoration program provide best methodology to revive various type file such as music, video, images, text files from different android technology based device. Company URL www.data-recovery-usb-drive.com is fully capable to retrieve user important document in format of PDF, DOC, HTML, TXT, EXCEL, POWER POINT etc in case of accidental damaged, power failure, software/hardware malfunction, improper handling of device etc.

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Android File Restore
(Utilities)
Android File Restore application is widely used to recover all kind of permanently deleted or undeleted data files and folder from major critical data loss incidents. Affordable Data restoration program provide best methodology to revive various type file such as music, video, images, text files from different android technology based device. Company URL www.data-recovery-usb-drive.com is fully capable to retrieve user important document in format of PDF, DOC, HTML, TXT, EXCEL, POWER POINT etc in case of accidental damaged, power failure, software/hardware malfunction, improper handling of device etc.

[read more]
